headline: Palantir Stock Set for Explosive AI Run, Says Wedbush Analyst Dan Ives
summary: Dan Ives said Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:PLTR) remains one of his top software picks in the artificial intelligence space, arguing that the company is still in the early stages of its long-term growth cycle.  Ives emphasized that both enterprise adoption and government deployment of AI technologies are accelerating, with Meta Nvidia Tesla trends reinforcing sector-wide momentum.  In his view, Meta Nvidia Tesla developments underscore how demand for AI infrastructure and software solutions continues to broaden across industries.
